allow: Bash(python3 -c "import docx2txt; print\(docx2txt.process\('/root/project/Deck产品设计文档.docx'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "docx2txt not installed")
Bash(gh repo create seangleridika-max/deck --private --description "深度研究与知识创作平台" --clone=false 2>&1)
Bash(git init && git add . && git commit -m "chore: initial Deck project setup with DevOps configuration" 2>&1 | tail -20)
